stemHtml: A modern Airborne Weather Radar (AWR) uses a flat plate antenna with a:

options.a: Cosecant squared beam with the tilt set to the aircraft pitch for ground mapping as the beam spreads out vertically to the ground.
options.b: Pencil or conical beam with the tilt set to the aircraft pitch for ground mapping.
options.c: Cosecant squared beam with the tilt set downward for ground mapping.
options.d: Pencil or conical beam with the tilt set downward for ground mapping.
